query: phase 5 phase 6 roadmap installer IDE MCP dashboard chat

results.title: coder CLI — state.go + cmd_new_project.go + cmd_map_codebase.go (Phases 9 & 10)
results.content: Implemented three new files for the coder CLI (cmd/coder/). state.go: shared ProjectState struct (project, current_phase, step, decisions, blockers, backlog, PRs map), RoadmapPhase, coderPath(), loadState(), saveState(), loadRoadmap(), phaseDir(), ensurePhaseDir(), projectExists(). All .coder/ paths route through coderPath(). cmd_new_project.go: runNewProject() — flags: --auto, --prd, --resume. Guards against re-init via projectExists(). Interactive deep Q&A via ChatStream loop (bufio.Scanner, blank×2 or 'done' to exit). Generates REQUIREMENTS.md then ROADMAP.md via streaming LLM, with [Y/n/edit] approval gates. Writes PROJECT.md + REQUIREMENTS.md + ROADMAP.md + STATE.md (phase=1, step=discuss). Uses getChatClient(cfg) pattern. cmd_map_codebase.go: runMapCodebase() — flag: --refresh, positional area arg. Four sequential ChatStream focus passes (tech→STACK.md, arch→ARCHITECTURE.md, quality→CONVENTIONS.md, concerns→CONCERNS.md) written to .coder/codebase/.

results.title: Phase 9-17 CLI Commands Implemented
results.content: Implemented all project lifecycle commands for coder CLI (phases 9-17 from roadmap-intelligence-flows.md). Files created: cmd_new_project.go (runNewProject - Q&A → REQUIREMENTS.md/ROADMAP.md/STATE.md), cmd_map_codebase.go (runMapCodebase - 4 sequential analyses → STACK/ARCH/CONVENTIONS/CONCERNS.md), cmd_discuss_phase.go (runDiscussPhase - gray-area Q&A → CONTEXT.md), cmd_plan_phase.go (runPlanPhase - research + XML plans + verification loop), cmd_execute_phase.go (runExecutePhase - wave-based execution + parsePlanXML + atomic git commits), cmd_ship.go (runShip - gh pr create with AI-generated body), cmd_progress.go (runProgress + runNext - STATE.md-aware navigation), cmd_milestone.go (runMilestone - audit/complete/archive/next lifecycle), cmd_todo.go (runTodo/runStats/runHealth/runNote/runDo - project utilities). All commands registered in main.go. go build + go vet both pass clean. STATE.md format: frontmatter fields + ## Decisions/Blockers/Backlog/PRs sections. XML plan

results.title: README + CLI docs + dashboard-plan cleanup
results.content: Updated docs/cli.md: full command reference for all 3 groups (A=quick AI: chat/review/debug/plan/qa/session/workflow, B=lifecycle: new-project/map-codebase/discuss-phase/plan-phase/execute-phase/ship/progress/next/milestone, C=utilities: todo/stats/health/note/do). Updated README.md: fixed broken links (skill_architecture.md→skill_system.md, memory.md→memory_system.md), added GUIDE.md to docs table, updated Features table (+AI Workflow Commands +Project Lifecycle +Web Dashboard), updated Key Commands section with 3 groups, added 5 Steps quick start (with lifecycle example), updated tagline, added Intelligence Roadmap link. Deleted docs/dashboard-plan.md (feature already implemented and documented in docs/dashboard.md). Build OK.

results.title: Phase 4.3 completed with console serving seam
results.content: Completed Phase 4.3 without creating a commit. Added dashboard config for base_path/static_dir/legacy_compat_enabled, served built dashboard assets under /console, redirected legacy setup/login/dashboard GET routes to /console equivalents when compatibility is disabled, and added tests/integration/test_phase4_3_console_gate.py. Focused verification now passes for architecture extraction, admin use cases, Astro scaffold, HTTP admin routes, setup/login flows, and console static serving. Broader Phase 4 remains open for observability and production hardening.

results.title: coder CLI Intelligence Layer — 8 AI Workflow Commands Implemented
results.content: Implemented all 8 phases of the Intelligence Flows Roadmap. New commands: coder chat (Q&A with SSE streaming), coder review (structured code review → JSON), coder debug (root cause analysis), coder plan (3-stage: Q&A→research→PLAN.md), coder qa (UAT from PLAN.md, auto-diagnose), coder session (save/restore context to .coder/sessions/), coder workflow (auto-chain: plan→review→implement→qa→fix). coder-node HTTP endpoints: POST /v1/chat, /v1/chat/stream (SSE), /v1/review, /v1/debug. Context injection pipeline: parallel goroutines (300ms timeout) for memory+skill search before every LLM call. State files saved in .coder/ (plans/, qa/, sessions/, workflows/). Agent configs updated: .claude/agents/coder.md, .agents/workflows/, .agents/skills/coder-cli/, .github/copilot-instructions.md. Run coder skill ingest --source local after updating skills.
